description: Parameter-only expression used inside other expressions to specify labels. Not a standalone command. Accepts one or two string arguments.
utility: Specify display labels inside other expressions

arguments.name: playingLabel
arguments.description: Secondary label shown during playback (used in playaction, playinputanimator)

examples.expression: x = dropdown(at(3, 4), "x", value(1, 2, 3), display("x"), type(number), ref(1))
